productDisplayName: Converse Unisex CT  LACE COLOR OX Black Casual Shoes
description: Dedicated to Basketball champ Chuck Taylor, this Chuck Taylor All-Star series from converse are also called Chucks and come in classic designs. Created using canvas and rubber, this range of sneakers from Converse have a retro feel.Upper   Canvas upper for easy maintenance and durability Purple textile lining for greater comfort Carbon rubber toe box for enhanced protection of the upper foot Long canvas tongue for added comfort and snug Fit Purple lace-ups through metallic eyelets for durability and snug fit      Midsole   Cushioned footbed delivers all day comfort   Outsole   Reinforced guard to protect the forefoot of the shoe and enhance durability Vulcanized rubber outsole with multi-directional pattern for flexibility and traction   Shoe careMake a paste using 1 tbsp of baking soda, 1 tbsp white vinegar and 1 tbsp hot water
